Home / Services / Electrical Repair

Electrical Repair

Fast, reliable electrical repair services for Indianapolis homes and businesses.

From flickering lights to complete power outages, 21 Electric provides comprehensive electrical repair services throughout Indianapolis. We understand the frustration and potential danger of electrical problems, especially during Indiana's harsh winters. Our experienced technicians quickly diagnose the issue and implement effective solutions to restore your power safely and efficiently.

We handle all types of electrical repairs, including faulty wiring, broken outlets, damaged circuit breakers, and malfunctioning appliances. We also specialize in troubleshooting complex electrical issues in older Indianapolis homes, addressing the unique challenges of outdated wiring systems found in neighborhoods like Broad Ripple and Irvington. Our commitment is to provide long-lasting repairs that meet or exceed all safety standards.

Don't risk your safety with DIY electrical fixes. Call 21 Electric for prompt and professional electrical repair services. We're available 24/7 for emergencies, ensuring you're never left in the dark.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Schedule a convenient appointment or request emergency service.
  2. 02 Step 2: Our technician will arrive on time and thoroughly assess the electrical problem.
  3. 03 Step 3: We'll provide a clear explanation of the issue and a detailed estimate for the repair.
  4. 04 Step 4: Upon your approval, we'll complete the repair efficiently and safely, ensuring your satisfaction.

Benefits

  • Quick response times
  • Accurate diagnostics
  • Safe and reliable repairs
  • Upfront pricing

Frequently Asked Questions

How quickly can you respond to an electrical emergency?

We offer 24/7 emergency service and strive to arrive at your location as quickly as possible. Our average response time in Indianapolis is within an hour.

Are your electricians licensed and insured?

Yes, all our electricians are fully licensed, bonded, and insured to protect your property and provide peace of mind.

Do you offer any warranties on your repairs?

Yes, we stand behind our workmanship and offer a warranty on all our electrical repairs. Contact us for specific warranty details.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with electrical repair? Contact us today.

Request Quote Or call: +17654446977
